name_en: Original FENDI hot classic Baguette, made of canvas with high-end craftsmanship. The whole bag features double FF 3D embroidery with an unbeatable texture, paired with exquisite edging in small contrasting colors for a more stylish look. The wide shoulder strap design and flap offer strong practicality. The small details everywhere are truly loveable~~size27×6×14cm 108F
